title: When a sibling repo needs staging, I want infra handoff executed with witness, so I can run product prereq checks
job: Receive staging substrate (secrets, ingress, deploy) from gtcx-infrastructure with auditable completion
situation: Product repo files inbound handoff (e.g. terminal-os W2, compliance-os Hub #17, markets authority routes)
motivation: Pilot deadline or sprint commitment blocked on AWS/K8s outside product repo ownership
expectedOutcome: Outbound seal published; product `w2:staging-prereq-check` or equivalent passes
painPoints: Handoff boundary unclear between product PM and infra execution
External URL failures mask in-cluster healthy services
Operator runbook dumps instead of agent execution
opportunities: Standard DaaS card per sibling repo
Coordination seal template with evidence JSON links
acceptanceCriteria: Staging scripts or terraform apply executed in-session with exit codes recorded
Sibling integrator can run product-side prereq check without infra shell access
nonGoals: Production apply without Class A authorization artifact
